# InsightFlow

> Business intelligence made simple. Upload CSV or Excel and instantly uncover trends, KPIs, and actionable insights.

InsightFlow is a modern SaaS BI platform for data analysts, operators, and founders. Upload business data, get automated dataset profiling, AI-generated executive summaries, KPI dashboards, and shareable reports.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with features, pricing, and testimonials
- [Sign in](/login): User sign in
- [Sign up](/register): Create a free account
